prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Photos of E-304 Wire pulling (feeders & branch) show several completed pieces, but the area count and remaining scope are not listed. The submitted package does not include the quantity takeoff needed to score the checkpoint. Source anchors for review: NEC 200.6, 210.5 (identification).
title: T1 E-304 Insufficient evidence Progress assessment
